systemPrompt: Count total lines in .txt files in a temporary workspace

tools.shell: Understands Linux commands conceptually and can reason about their effects in a temporary workspace.

prompts: In a temporary workspace we have these files and line counts: a.txt (10 lines), b.txt (12 lines), notes.md (5 lines), c.txt (8 lines). Using Linux commands conceptually (e.g. cat + wc -l), what is the total number of lines across all .txt files? Answer only with the final number.
